creator: edwin@FreeBSD.org
text:
State Changed
From-To: open->feedback

I get the following error when running configure: 

===>  Configuring for winexe-071026 
cd /var/ports/root/cvs/ports/NEW/winexe/work/winexe-source-071026 && /var/ports/root/cvs/ports/NEW/winexe/work/winexe-source-071026/autogen.sh 
/var/ports/root/cvs/ports/NEW/winexe/work/winexe-source-071026/autogen.sh: running script/mkversion.sh 
svn: not found 
svk: not found 
bzr: not found 
./script/mkversion.sh: 'version.h' created for Samba("4.0.0tp4-SVN-build-UNKNOWN") 
/var/ports/root/cvs/ports/NEW/winexe/work/winexe-source-071026/autogen.sh: running autoheader -I. -Ilib/replace 
/var/ports/root/cvs/ports/NEW/winexe/work/winexe-source-071026/autogen.sh: running autoconf -I. -Ilib/replace 
Now run ./configure and then make. 
/usr/local/bin/gm4:lib/replace/libreplace.m4:355: cannot open `libreplace_cc.m4': No such file or directory 
/usr/local/bin/gm4:lib/replace/libreplace.m4:356: cannot open `libreplace_macros.m4': No such file or directory 
/usr/local/bin/gm4:lib/replace/libreplace.m4:357: cannot open `autoconf-2.60.m4': No such file or directory 
/usr/local/bin/gm4:lib/replace/samba.m4:1: cannot open `system/config.m4': No such file or directory 
/usr/local/bin/gm4:lib/replace/samba.m4:1: cannot open `dlfcn.m4': No such file or directory 
/usr/local/bin/gm4:lib/replace/samba.m4:1: cannot open `getpass.m4': No such file or directory 
/usr/local/bin/gm4:lib/replace/samba.m4:1: cannot open `win32.m4': No such file or directory 
/usr/local/bin/gm4:lib/replace/samba.m4:1: cannot open `timegm.m4': No such file or directory 
/usr/local/bin/gm4:lib/replace/samba.m4:1: cannot open `repdir.m4': No such file or directory 
autom4te-2.61: /usr/local/bin/gm4 failed with exit status: 1 

Any idea where to find the files required?
